replacement of proton with ammonium ion

project.title: prostate cancer cell LNCaP_cell glycosylation_GDF15 glycosylation inducing CRPC
project.projectDescription: we examined the glycoproteomics of N-glycosylation in untreated LNCaP (NC), ST-EPI, LT-EPI, ST-ENZ, and LT-ENZ groups using Tandem Mass Tag (TMT) labels by nanoscale liquid chromatography coupled to tandem mass spectrometry (nanoLC-MS/MS).LNCaP-NC, SP-EPI, SP-ENZ, LP-EPI, and LP-ENZ cells each with two biological replicates were used for glycoproteomics analysis.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: Samples were lytic and the supernatant proteins were quantitative by BCA kit. For digestion, the protein solution was reduced with dithiothreitol (DTT) and followed with alkylated with iodoacetamide (IAM) in darkness. Sequencing-grade trypsin (Promega, Madison, WI) was added for the digestion overnight. After trypsin digestion, peptide was desalted and reconstituted in 0.5 M TEAB and processed according to the manufacturer’s protocol for TMT10 plexTM kit (Thermo Scientific, 90110, San Jose, CA). The glycopeptides were enriched by a one-step-in-house-method of enriching intact glycopeptides as we described previously. The global-peptides and glycopeptides were resuspended in 2% CAN and 0.1% FA solution and ten analyzed using an EASY-nLC 1200 system (Thermo Scientific, San Jose, CA) coupled with a high-resolution Orbitrap Fusion Lumos mass spectrum (Thermo Scientific, San Jose, CA). The samples were first separated with an RSLC C18 column (1.9 µm x 100 µm X 20 cm) packed in house. The LC conditions and MS parameters for glycol-depleted global peptides and intact glycopeptides (IGPs) were described previously. The results were filtered based on the following criteria: (1) a false discovery rate (FDR) less than 1% for glycoproteins and (2) each peptide spectra matches (PSM) annotated by at least one N-linked glycan.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: The resulting MS/MS data were processed using Maxquant search engine (v.1.5.2.8). Tandem mass spectra were searched against homo_Uniprot-organism database concatenated with reverse decoy database. For IGPs identification, the data were searched using GPQuest 2.0. The parameters for analysis were described previously.

references.referenceLine: Wang R, Wen P, Yang G, Feng Y, Mi Y, Wang X, Zhu S, Chen YQ. N-glycosylation of GDF15 abolishes its inhibitory effect on EGFR in AR inhibitor-resistant prostate cancer cells. Cell Death Dis. 2022 13(7):626

Characteristics[CleavageAgent]: Sequencing-grade trypsin (Promega, WI, USA) was added for overnight digestion.
Characteristics[NumberOfSamples]: LNCaP-NC, ST-EPI, ST-ENZ, LT-EPI, and LT-ENZ cells were used for quantitative proteomics analysis.
Comment[Instrument]: Global-peptides were resuspended in 2% acetonitrile (ACN) and 0.1% formic acid (FA) solution and then analyzed using an EASY-nLC 1200 system (Thermo Scientific, CA, USA) coupled with a high-resolution Orbitrap Fusion Lumos mass spectrum (Thermo Scientific).
Comment[Separation]: Peptides were first separated with an RSLC C18 column (1.9 µm × 100 µm × 20 cm) packed in house, then selected for MS/MS using NCE setting as 28, and the fragments were detected in the Orbitrap at a resolution of 17,500.
Comment[MS2MassAnalyzer]: the fragments were detected in the Orbitrap at a resolution of 17,500.
Comment[AcquisitionMethod]: A data-dependent procedure that alternated between one MS scan followed by 20 MS/MS scans with 15.0 s dynamic exclusion.
